name: Impeccable
description: Design fluency for frontend development. 1 skill with 23 commands (/impeccable polish, /impeccable audit, /impeccable critique, etc.) and curated anti-pattern detection.
longDescription:
Ships **1 skill** and **17 commands** for frontend design quality.

The `frontend-design` skill expands Anthropic's original with **7 reference files** covering typography, color and contrast, spatial design, motion, interaction, responsive design, and UX writing. Each reference includes curated anti-patterns — overused fonts, gray-on-color text, nested cards, bounce easing — that explicitly steer the AI away from generic output.

**17 slash commands**: `/audit`, `/critique`, `/normalize`, `/polish`, `/distill`, `/clarify`, `/optimize`, `/harden`, `/animate`, `/colorize`, `/bolder`, `/quieter`, `/delight`, `/extract`, `/adapt`, `/onboard`, `/teach-impeccable`
